title: Day1ProfileReport
description: Output of ADR-006 mandatory .dbf inspection phase. Written by inspector.run_inspection().

inspection_run_id.description: UUID for this inspection run. Recorded in geo_ingest_registry.run_id.

analytical_dataset_count.description: Count of datasets with operation_mode='analytical'. 0 triggers halt_condition=true.

halt_condition.description: True when analytical_dataset_count=0. Caller MUST NOT proceed to Bronze pipeline.

halt_reason.description: Human-readable halt explanation. Non-null only when halt_condition=true.

archive_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the .7z archive. Primary dedup key in geo_ingest_registry.

shp_path.description: Filesystem path to the extracted .shp file.

crs_epsg.description: EPSG code of source CRS. Null if CRS is absent or non-EPSG.

crs_wkt.description: WKT string of source CRS for full audit trail.

numeric_columns.description: fiona type 'int' or 'float' columns, excluding shape metadata noise.

categorical_columns.description: fiona type 'str' columns, excluding objectid/shape_area noise.

code_columns.description: Subset of categorical_columns that match PSGC regex patterns.

operation_mode.description: analytical: numeric cols found → H3+Jenks+Kimball. geometry_only: no numeric/codes. boundary_catalog: PSGC codes only → dim_region load.

recommended_indicator.description: Highest-cardinality non-binary numeric column. Passed to gold/h3_aggregate.py as value_column. Null for non-analytical modes.

sample_values.description: Up to 5 sample values per key column for human QA. Keys are column names.

fiona_schema.description: Raw fiona schema properties dict for full audit trail.

inspection_error.description: Non-null only if profile_shapefile() raised an exception. Dataset counts as geometry_only.
